import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

# Tile and color constants
FLOOR = 1
WALL = 2
BALL = 3
PYRAMID = 5
HEX = 11
EMPTY = 0

GREEN = 2
BLUE = 3
YELLOW = 5

DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]], dtype=jnp.int32)


def get_observation(state):
    grid = state.grid
    H, W = grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Agent info
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_y = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_x = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    # Pocket info
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_blue_pyr = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == EMPTY).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_norm = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    pocket_color_norm = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0

    # Blue pyramid location
    blue_pyr_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_norm_y = blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_norm_x = blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.minimum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)

    # Relative vector: agent -> blue pyramid (normalized)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_to_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Yellow hex location
    yellow_hex_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yellow_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    yellow_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    yellow_hex_norm_y = yellow_hex_y / (H_f - 1)
    yellow_hex_norm_x = yellow_hex_x / (W_f - 1)
    yellow_hex_exists = jnp.minimum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)

    # Relative vector: agent -> yellow hex (normalized)
    rel_hex_y = (yellow_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yellow_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_to_hex = (jnp.abs(yellow_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yellow_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Agent adjacency to yellow hex
    agent_y_int = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32)
    agent_x_int = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32)
    hex_y_int = yellow_hex_y.astype(jnp.int32)
    hex_x_int = yellow_hex_x.astype(jnp.int32)
    manhattan_agent_to_hex = jnp.abs(agent_y_int - hex_y_int) + jnp.abs(agent_x_int - hex_x_int)
    agent_adjacent_to_hex = (manhattan_agent_to_hex <= 1).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Green ball on ground (placed)
    green_ball_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    green_ball_count = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    green_ball_y = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_x = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_exists = jnp.minimum(green_ball_count, 1.0)
    green_ball_norm_y = green_ball_y / (H_f - 1)
    green_ball_norm_x = green_ball_x / (W_f - 1)

    # Distance from placed green ball to yellow hex
    dist_gb_to_hex = (jnp.abs(green_ball_y - yellow_hex_y) + jnp.abs(green_ball_x - yellow_hex_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    gb_adjacent_to_hex = ((jnp.abs(green_ball_y - yellow_hex_y) + jnp.abs(green_ball_x - yellow_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32) * green_ball_exists

    # Front tile info
    dy = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = grid[front_y, front_x, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    front_tile_color = grid[front_y, front_x, 1].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) & (grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == BLUE)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == FLOOR).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_yellow_hex = ((grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == HEX) & (grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == YELLOW)).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Task phase encoding (one-hot style)
    # Phase 0: need to pick up blue pyramid (not holding green ball, pyramid exists)
    # Phase 1: holding green ball, need to go to hex and place
    # Phase 2: done (green ball adjacent to hex)
    phase0 = ((~(state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL)) & (blue_pyr_count > 0)).astype(jnp.float32)
    phase1 = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)).astype(jnp.float32)
    phase2 = gb_adjacent_to_hex

    # Step progress
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # 4 neighbors of yellow hex - check if any floor tile is adjacent
    # This helps agent know where to place
    hex_neighbor_y0 = jnp.clip(hex_y_int - 1, 0, H - 1)
    hex_neighbor_y2 = jnp.clip(hex_y_int + 1, 0, H - 1)
    hex_neighbor_x1 = jnp.clip(hex_x_int - 1, 0, W - 1)
    hex_neighbor_x3 = jnp.clip(hex_x_int + 1, 0, W - 1)

    # Closest floor tile adjacent to hex (for placement)
    # Just encode the 4 neighbors
    n0_tile = grid[hex_neighbor_y0, hex_x_int, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    n1_tile = grid[hex_y_int, hex_neighbor_x1, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    n2_tile = grid[hex_neighbor_y2, hex_x_int, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
    n3_tile = grid[hex_y_int, hex_neighbor_x3, 0].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        jnp.array([norm_y, norm_x], dtype=jnp.float32),                    # 2
        dir_oh.astype(jnp.float32),                                          # 4
        jnp.array([pocket_tile_norm, pocket_color_norm], dtype=jnp.float32), # 2
        jnp.array([holding_green_ball, pocket_empty], dtype=jnp.float32),    # 2
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_norm_y, blue_pyr_norm_x, blue_pyr_exists], dtype=jnp.float32),  # 3
        jnp.array([rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x, dist_to_pyr], dtype=jnp.float32),  # 3
        jnp.array([yellow_hex_norm_y, yellow_hex_norm_x, yellow_hex_exists], dtype=jnp.float32), # 3
        jnp.array([rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x, dist_to_hex], dtype=jnp.float32),  # 3
        jnp.array([agent_adjacent_to_hex], dtype=jnp.float32),               # 1
        jnp.array([green_ball_norm_y, green_ball_norm_x, green_ball_exists], dtype=jnp.float32), # 3
        jnp.array([dist_gb_to_hex, gb_adjacent_to_hex], dtype=jnp.float32),  # 2
        jnp.array([front_tile_id, front_tile_color], dtype=jnp.float32),     # 2
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor, front_is_yellow_hex], dtype=jnp.float32), # 3
        jnp.array([phase0, phase1, phase2], dtype=jnp.float32),              # 3
        jnp.array([step_norm], dtype=jnp.float32),                           # 1
        jnp.array([n0_tile, n1_tile, n2_tile, n3_tile], dtype=jnp.float32),  # 4
    ])
    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)


def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    grid = state.grid
    next_grid = next_state.grid
    H, W = grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)
    norm_denom = H_f + W_f - 2.0

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')

    # Pocket states
    was_holding_green_ball = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    now_holding_green_ball = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    was_pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == EMPTY)
    now_pocket_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == EMPTY)

    # Just picked up blue pyramid -> now holding green ball
    just_picked_up = (~was_holding_green_ball) & now_holding_green_ball
    pickup_reward = jax.lax.select(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Yellow hex location (use current state, it doesn't move)
    yellow_hex_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yellow_hex_count = jnp.sum(yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_y = jnp.sum(yy * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)
    hex_x = jnp.sum(xx * yellow_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(yellow_hex_count, 1.0)

    # Green ball on ground - current and next state
    gb_mask_cur = (grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count_cur = jnp.sum(gb_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32)

    gb_mask_next = (next_grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count_next = jnp.sum(gb_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32)
    gb_y_next = jnp.sum(yy * gb_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_next, 1.0)
    gb_x_next = jnp.sum(xx * gb_mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_next, 1.0)

    # Distance from placed green ball to hex in next state
    dist_gb_hex_next = jnp.abs(gb_y_next - hex_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_next - hex_x)
    gb_adjacent_next = (dist_gb_hex_next <= 1.0) & (gb_count_next > 0.0)

    # Was green ball adjacent to hex before?
    gb_y_cur = jnp.sum(yy * gb_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_cur, 1.0)
    gb_x_cur = jnp.sum(xx * gb_mask_cur).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_cur, 1.0)
    dist_gb_hex_cur = jnp.abs(gb_y_cur - hex_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_cur - hex_x)
    gb_adjacent_cur = (dist_gb_hex_cur <= 1.0) & (gb_count_cur > 0.0)

    # Task success: green ball just placed adjacent to hex
    ball_just_placed = was_holding_green_ball & (~now_holding_green_ball) & (gb_count_next > gb_count_cur)
    success = ball_just_placed & gb_adjacent_next
    success_reward = jax.lax.select(success, jnp.float32(20.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Continuous reward: green ball is adjacent to hex (even if placed earlier)
    # This rewards maintaining the ball near the hex
    already_done_reward = jax.lax.select(
        gb_adjacent_next & (~success),
        jnp.float32(0.5),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Agent positions
    agent_y_cur = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_cur = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_y_next = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_next = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)

    # Blue pyramid location
    blue_pyr_mask = (grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx * blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)

    # Phase 1 shaping: move toward blue pyramid
    dist_to_pyr_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - pyr_x)
    dist_to_pyr_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - pyr_x)
    pyr_progress = (dist_to_pyr_cur - dist_to_pyr_next) / norm_denom
    pyr_shaping = jax.lax.select(
        (~was_holding_green_ball) & (blue_pyr_count > 0.0),
        jnp.float32(1.0) * pyr_progress,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Phase 2 shaping: move toward yellow hex while holding green ball
    dist_to_hex_cur = jnp.abs(agent_y_cur - hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_cur - hex_x)
    dist_to_hex_next = jnp.abs(agent_y_next - hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x_next - hex_x)
    hex_progress = (dist_to_hex_cur - dist_to_hex_next) / norm_denom
    hex_shaping = jax.lax.select(
        was_holding_green_ball & (yellow_hex_count > 0.0),
        jnp.float32(1.0) * hex_progress,
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Bonus for being adjacent to hex while holding green ball (encourages putdown)
    agent_y_int_next = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32)
    agent_x_int_next = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32)
    hex_y_int = hex_y.astype(jnp.int32)
    hex_x_int = hex_x.astype(jnp.int32)
    next_agent_adj_to_hex = (jnp.abs(agent_y_int_next - hex_y_int) + jnp.abs(agent_x_int_next - hex_x_int)) <= 1

    agent_y_int_cur = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32)
    agent_x_int_cur = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32)
    cur_agent_adj_to_hex = (jnp.abs(agent_y_int_cur - hex_y_int) + jnp.abs(agent_x_int_cur - hex_x_int)) <= 1

    # Reward for first time reaching adjacency to hex while holding ball
    just_reached_hex_adj = was_holding_green_ball & next_agent_adj_to_hex & (~cur_agent_adj_to_hex)
    adj_hex_bonus = jax.lax.select(just_reached_hex_adj, jnp.float32(2.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    total_reward = (pickup_reward + success_reward + already_done_reward +
                    pyr_shaping + hex_shaping + adj_hex_bonus)

    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
